candidate.notes: different labels in same place place_00000

object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: Beige painted textured wall running along left side of image
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous interior wall painted a warm beige/tan with a slightly textured finish. The wall fills the entire left third of the image from foreground to background; it is flush with a white baseboard at the floor. Visible scuff marks or slight discoloration toward the center-right of this wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs left of the stair landing and opposite the staircase/banister on the right
object_a.object_text_short: Beige painted textured wall running along left side of image
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | Continuous interior wall painted a warm beige/tan with a slightly textured finish. The wall fills the entire left third of the image from foreground to background; it is flush with a white baseboard at the floor. Visible scuff marks or slight discoloration toward the center-right of this wall.

object_b.label: picture frame
object_b.description: three framed pictures along left wall above staircase
object_b.long_form_open_description: A horizontal trio of picture frames hung along the left wall following the staircase angle; frames appear to be white and black with landscape/abstract prints. They are mounted at eye to upper-eye height and align with the stair slope.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Hung on the wall above the stairs and balusters, running parallel to the handrail
